'''''Terrup''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of the fleet that patrolled the [[Killaniri system/Legends|Killaniri system]].

{{Ship-stub}}
